ham.subject: Out of Office – Ravi Sharma
ham.body:
Hello Team,

I hope you are doing well. I wanted to let you know that I will be out of the office from 15th April to 22nd April, returning on 23rd April.

During my absence, please direct any project related queries to my colleague, Kavita Patel (kavita.patel@company.com) or email the support team at support@company.com.

Thank you for understanding and have a productive week!

Best regards,
Ravi Sharma

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Will Be Suspended – Verify Now!
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet account. As a result, your wallet will be suspended unless immediate verification is performed.

Please click the button below to confirm your identity and avoid permanent suspension:

<URL>

You have 24 hours to respond. Failure to comply will result in the loss of all funds in your wallet.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,

The Security Team
CryptoSecure Services
